2605.30290.title: Self-Trained Verification for Training- and Test-Time Self-Improvement
2605.30290.paper_summary: Self-improvement at scale has been a longstanding goal for reasoning models, and there are two natural places to do it: at test time, through verification-refinement (V-R) loops; and at training time, through self-training methods. Both are gated by the same bottleneck: the verifier. V-R loops stall when verifier scores inflate while accuracy stagnates, and when feedback is too generic to act on; self-training fails similarly when bad self-generated data are added to training. Better verification would unlock both, but the capability we want to train, i.e., catching self-generated errors, lacks training signal. To address this challenge, we propose self-trained verification (STV). Our key observation is that, while a model cannot catch these errors alone, it can when shown the reference solution. We turn this asymmetry into a supervision target and train the verifier to imitate a more informed version of itself. At test time, STV substantially improves V-R loops on hard problems, while alternatives (e.g., SFT, RL on verifier scores, and even meta-verifiers) do not. STV roughly doubles accuracy on hard math and lifts it 14x on scientific reasoning tasks (1.5% to 21%). At training time, we additionally train the generator using RL with STV verifier's feedback inside the V-R loop - a procedure we call verifier-in-the-loop training (ViL). Starting from an RL-converged generator, ViL yields a further 33% gain in pass@1. More notably, the generator's standalone pass@1, with no verifier at test time, climbs 30% relative past where standard RL had converged. Hence, the next frontier in reasoning on hard problems may lie in how we train for and with verification.
2605.30290.paper_summary_zh: 自我提升在大規模上一直是推理模型的一個長期目標，而有兩個自然的地方可以實現這一點：在測試時通過驗證-改進（V-R）循環；以及在訓練時通過自我訓練方法。這兩者都受到同一瓶頸的限制：驗證器。當驗證器的分數膨脹而準確率停滯不前，且反饋過於通用無法採取行動時，V-R 循環會停滯；當不良的自生成數據被添加到訓練中時，自我訓練同樣會失敗。更好的驗證將解鎖這兩者，但我們想要訓練的能力，即捕捉自生成的錯誤，缺乏訓練信號。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了自我訓練驗證（STV）。我們的關鍵觀察是，儘管模型無法單獨捕捉這些錯誤，但當顯示參考解決方案時，它可以做到。我們將這種不對稱性轉化為監督目標，並訓練驗證器模仿其更有信息的版本。在測試時，STV 在困難問題上的 V-R 循環顯著改善，而替代方案（例如，SFT、基於驗證器分數的強化學習，甚至元驗證器）則沒有。STV 大約將困難數學的準確率翻倍，並在科學推理任務上提升 14 倍（從 1.5% 提升到 21%）。在訓練時，我們還使用強化學習和 STV 驗證器的反饋在 V-R 循環內進一步訓練生成器——這一程序我們稱之為循環內驗證器訓練（ViL）。從一個已收斂的強化學習生成器開始，ViL 使 pass@1 進一步增長 33%。更值得注意的是，生成器在測試時的獨立 pass@1，無需驗證器，相對於標準強化學習收斂的過去，上升了 30%。因此，在解決困難問題的推理中，下一個前沿可能在於我們如何進行驗證的訓練。
2605.30290.author: Chen Henry Wu et.al.
